name: @modelscript/ide
description: ModelScript VS Code Web IDE with GitHub/GitLab repository integration

scripts.build: npm run download-vscode && npm run build-github-fs && npm run build-server
scripts.build-github-fs: cd github-fs && npx webpack --mode production --devtool hidden-source-map
scripts.build-static: npm run download-vscode && npm run build-github-fs && npx tsx src/build-static.ts
scripts.dev: npm run download-vscode && npx tsx src/server.ts
